name: zco-bi-platform
description: Standalone BI platform for Zco sales intelligence

scripts.bi:top: python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('..\\data\\outreach.db'); c.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; cur=c.cursor(); cur.execute('SELECT name,vertical,tier,status,prospect_score FROM bi_top_prospects LIMIT 20'); rows=cur.fetchall(); [print(dict(r)) for r in rows]; c.close()"
